source_group_label: Oracle Bone Script: Six Digit Numerical Code
risk_note: Figshare package metadata reports CC BY 4.0; Scientific Data article page uses CC BY-NC-ND 4.0. Raw package is 607933810 bytes and must not be committed to regular Git.
caution: HUST-OBC zip-directory candidate only; not an accepted oracle character, reading, component, evolution chain, or decipherment conclusion. Article reports 9411 undeciphered characters, but the inspected zip directory yielded 9408 candidate class directories; discrepancy needs review.
